name: Stuffed Eggplant Pickles
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------STUFFING-------------------------
1/2 small head Cabbage
1 large Red bell pepper
1 small head Garlic, peeled & separated into cloves
1 bunch Fresh dill
Celery leaves
Boil unpeeled eggplants for 5 to 10 minutes until tender but not too soft. Drain and cool. Squeeze out moisture. Place a heavy object over the eggplants and let stand overnight. Boil whole celery ribs until soft and set aside. Slice eggplants lengthwise, stopping just short of the end, being careful not to cut through to the other side. Stuff each eggplant with the filling. Tie each eggplant with a piece of celery rib to keep the filling in place. Place in a clean jar with a tight-fitting glass top.
Combine enough vinegar to cover the eggplants with salt (2 teaspoons salt for every cup of vinegar used). Pour over the eggplants. Cover jar tightly and let stand 2 to 3 weeks. When ready, refrigerate.
STUFFING: Shred cabbage, mince red bell pepper, garlic, dill, and celery leaves. Mix together.
